subtitle.en: Murder Under the Grand Ducal Fireworks
subtitle.it: Omicidio sotto i fuochi del Granducato
subtitle.sq: Vrasje nën fishekzjarrët e Dukatit të Madh

objective.en: A Grand Duke is dead and a temporary Armundia badge sits in the access trail. Read the archive, reconstruct the night, and name the culprit, the motive, the method and the decisive evidence. No single document tells the truth — trust the mosaic.
objective.it: Un Granduca è morto e un badge temporaneo Armundia compare negli accessi. Leggete l'archivio, ricostruite la notte e indicate colpevole, movente, metodo e prova decisiva. Nessun documento da solo dice la verità: fidatevi del mosaico.
objective.sq: Një Dukë i Madh ka vdekur dhe një distinktiv i përkohshëm Armundia shfaqet në regjistrat e hyrjeve. Lexoni arkivin, rindërtoni natën dhe emërtoni fajtorin, motivin, metodën dhe provën vendimtare.

intro.en: An urgent request has reached your team. Read it before opening the archive.
intro.it: Una richiesta urgente è arrivata alla vostra squadra. Leggetela prima di aprire l'archivio.
intro.sq: Një kërkesë urgjente ka mbërritur te ekipi juaj. Lexojeni para se të hapni arkivin.

objective.en: Understand why an external team has been asked to review the case.
objective.it: Capire perché una squadra esterna è stata chiamata a rivedere il caso.
objective.sq: Kuptoni pse një ekip i jashtëm është thirrur të rishikojë rastin.

intro.en: The Grand Duke is found dead the morning after the National Day fireworks. Establish what happened, where, and within which time window.
intro.it: Il Granduca viene trovato morto la mattina dopo i fuochi della festa nazionale. Stabilite cosa è successo, dove e in quale finestra temporale.
intro.sq: Duka i Madh gjendet i vdekur mëngjesin pas fishekzjarrëve të Ditës Kombëtare. Përcaktoni çfarë ndodhi, ku dhe brenda cilës dritare kohore.

objective.en: Pin down the place and the time window of the death, and understand why an Armundia badge drags the group into the case.
objective.it: Individuate luogo e finestra temporale della morte e capite perché un badge Armundia coinvolge il gruppo.
objective.sq: Përcaktoni vendin dhe dritaren kohore të vdekjes dhe kuptoni pse një distinktiv Armundia e përfshin grupin.

question.en: The first point is not where the body was found, but where everyone was looking while no one was watching. Read the scene-setting evidence and name that place.
question.it: Il primo punto non è dove è stato trovato il corpo, ma dove tutti guardavano mentre nessuno vedeva. Leggete le prove e nominate quel luogo.
question.sq: Pika e parë nuk është ku u gjet trupi, por ku po shihnin të gjithë ndërsa askush nuk po vëzhgonte. Lexoni provat dhe emërtoni atë vend.

intro.en: Everyone tells a story. Compare statements, walking times and call logs to find who cannot be where they claim.
intro.it: Ognuno racconta la sua versione. Confrontate dichiarazioni, tempi a piedi e cronologie chiamate per trovare chi non può essere dove dice.
intro.sq: Secili tregon një histori. Krahasoni deklaratat, kohët në këmbë dhe regjistrat e thirrjeve për të gjetur kush nuk mund të jetë aty ku pretendon.

objective.en: Map declared alibis against distances and timings. Notice that several alibis are incomplete — not only the obvious suspect's.
objective.it: Confrontate gli alibi dichiarati con distanze e orari. Notate che diversi alibi sono incompleti, non solo quello del sospetto ovvio.
objective.sq: Krahasoni alibitë e deklaruara me distancat dhe oraret. Vini re se disa alibi janë të paplota.

question.en: The place everyone returns to is not the place everyone says they were. Read the statements and find the group's base — the exact street and number.
question.it: Il luogo dove tutti tornano non è quello dove tutti dicono di essere stati. Leggete le dichiarazioni e trovate la base del gruppo: via e numero esatti.
question.sq: Vendi ku kthehen të gjithë nuk është vendi ku të gjithë thonë se ishin. Lexoni deklaratat dhe gjeni bazën e grupit — rrugën dhe numrin e saktë.

title.en: The Evidence Does Not Add Up

intro.en: The forensic and technical traces look damning for one developer. Read them closely: a badge proves the use of an object, not the identity of the person holding it.
intro.it: Le tracce forensi e tecniche sembrano schiaccianti per un developer. Leggetele con attenzione: un badge prova l'uso di un oggetto, non l'identità di chi lo usa.
intro.sq: Gjurmët forenzike dhe teknike duken shkatërruese për një zhvillues. Lexojini me kujdes: një distinktiv provon përdorimin e një objekti, jo identitetin e mbajtësit.

objective.en: Separate the strong-looking technical clues from the truth. Show that Davide's badge could have been used by someone else, and that the patch is not the murder.
objective.it: Separate gli indizi tecnici apparentemente forti dalla verità. Dimostrate che il badge di Davide poteva essere usato da altri e che la patch non è il delitto.
objective.sq: Ndani gjurmët teknike që duken të forta nga e vërteta. Tregoni se distinktivi i Davides mund të jetë përdorur nga dikush tjetër.

question.en: Which evidence looks strong but is actually contaminated or misread? Hint: consider the location where official records might be misleading.
question.it: Quale prova sembra forte ma in realtà è contaminata o mal interpretata? Indizio: considerate la sede dove i registri ufficiali potrebbero essere ingannevoli.
question.sq: Cila provë duket e fortë por në fakt është e kontaminuar ose e keqlexuar? Indizi: konsideroni vendin ku regjistrat zyrtarë mund të jenë mashtrues.

intro.en: Connect the supplier, the badges, the access routes and the motive. The person at the centre of all of them is the one you are looking for.
intro.it: Collegate il fornitore, i badge, i percorsi di accesso e il movente. La persona al centro di tutto è quella che cercate.
intro.sq: Lidhni furnitorin, distinktivët, rrugët e hyrjes dhe motivin. Personi në qendër të të gjithave është ai që kërkoni.

objective.en: Tie LuxEvent Secure, the temporary badges, the side-room access and the motive together. Find the final password and submit your accusation.
objective.it: Collegate LuxEvent Secure, i badge temporanei, l'accesso alla sala e il movente. Trovate la password finale e formulate l'accusa.
objective.sq: Lidhni LuxEvent Secure, distinktivët e përkohshëm, hyrjen anësore dhe motivin. Gjeni fjalëkalimin përfundimtar.

question.en: Do not look for the code that kills. Look for the document that explains what had been fixed before everyone started lying — its title is your final key.
question.it: Non cercate il codice che uccide. Cercate il documento che spiega cosa era stato corretto prima che tutti iniziassero a mentire: il suo titolo è la chiave finale.
question.sq: Mos kërkoni kodin që vret. Kërkoni dokumentin që shpjegon çfarë ishte rregulluar para se të gjithë të fillonin të gënjenin — titulli i tij është çelësi juaj përfundimtar.

title.it: Collegamento polizia — Richiesta di supporto investigativo
title.sq: Ndërlidhje policie — Kërkesë për mbështetje hetimore

description.en: An urgent email asking your team to review a restricted evidence package.
description.it: Un'email urgente che chiede alla vostra squadra di rivedere un pacchetto di prove riservato.
description.sq: Një email urgjent që i kërkon ekipit tuaj të rishikojë një paketë provash të kufizuar.

content.en:
From: Luxembourg Police Liaison Office
To: External Investigative Review Team
Subject: Urgent Investigative Support Request — The Gëlle Fra Case
Classification: CONFIDENTIAL

Dear colleagues,

You have been granted temporary access to a restricted evidence package concerning the death of Grand Duke Émeric IV of Luxembourg-Vallée, found on the morning of 23 June, a few hours after the National Day fireworks.

A temporary access badge linked to the Armundia Luxembourg retreat appears in the access trail near the body. The official investigation is struggling with conflicting alibis, unreliable crowd-movement data and several misleading technical traces.

Your task is to:
  1. review the evidence archive in full;
  2. reconstruct the timeline of the night;
  3. identify the culprit;
  4. explain the motive;
  5. describe the method;
  6. isolate the decisive evidence.

A warning from our analysts: do not rely on a single document. The badge logs, call records, maps, chat screenshots and forensic notes only make sense when read together. The loudest clue is not always the true one.

When your team is ready, submit your final accusation through this application.

With thanks for your discretion,
Luxembourg Police Liaison Office
content.it:
Da: Ufficio di collegamento della Polizia del Lussemburgo
A: Squadra esterna di revisione investigativa
Oggetto: Richiesta urgente di supporto investigativo — Il Caso Gëlle Fra
Classificazione: RISERVATO

Gentili colleghi,

Vi è stato concesso un accesso temporaneo a un pacchetto di prove riservato relativo alla morte del Granduca Émeric IV di Luxembourg-Vallée, trovato la mattina del 23 giugno, poche ore dopo i fuochi della festa nazionale.

Un badge di accesso temporaneo collegato al retreat di Armundia Luxembourg compare negli accessi vicino al corpo. L'indagine ufficiale è alle prese con alibi contraddittori, dati di movimento della folla inaffidabili e diverse tracce tecniche fuorvianti.

Il vostro compito è:
  1. esaminare l'intero archivio delle prove;
  2. ricostruire la cronologia della notte;
  3. identificare il colpevole;
  4. spiegare il movente;
  5. descrivere il metodo;
  6. isolare la prova decisiva.

Un avvertimento dai nostri analisti: non fidatevi di un singolo documento. Log dei badge, tabulati, mappe, screenshot delle chat e referti forensi hanno senso solo letti insieme. L'indizio più rumoroso non è sempre quello vero.

Quando la squadra è pronta, inviate l'accusa finale tramite questa applicazione.

Grazie per la vostra discrezione,
Ufficio di collegamento della Polizia del Lussemburgo

description.en: A newspaper front page sets the scene the morning after the fireworks.
description.it: Una prima pagina descrive la scena la mattina dopo i fuochi.
description.sq: Një faqe e parë përshkruan skenën mëngjesin pas fishekzjarrëve.

content.en:
LE COURRIER DU GRAND-DUCHÉ — 23 June, morning edition

MYSTERY DURING THE NATIONAL DAY

The capital woke to rumours this morning after authorities confirmed an "unexpected death" near the official route of the National Day celebrations. Sources speak of a prominent public figure, though no name has been released.

The night had been one of the busiest of the year. Tens of thousands gathered at Place de la Constitution, beneath the golden statue of the Gëlle Fra, to watch the twenty-minute fireworks display rise from the lower town at midnight. Music and crowds filled the old town until the early hours.

Officials have asked the public for patience and discretion. "We are reviewing access records, recordings and witness accounts," a spokesperson said. An international group of technology consultants present in the city for a private retreat is reportedly assisting with the review of digital traces.
content.it:
LE COURRIER DU GRAND-DUCHÉ — 23 giugno, edizione del mattino

MISTERO DURANTE LA FESTA NAZIONALE

La capitale si è svegliata tra le voci dopo che le autorità hanno confermato una «morte inattesa» vicino al percorso ufficiale delle celebrazioni. Le fonti parlano di una figura pubblica di rilievo, ma nessun nome è stato diffuso.

La notte era stata tra le più affollate dell'anno. Decine di migliaia di persone si erano radunate a Place de la Constitution, sotto la statua dorata della Gëlle Fra, per vedere i venti minuti di fuochi salire dalla città bassa a mezzanotte.

Le autorità chiedono pazienza e discrezione. «Stiamo esaminando registri di accesso, registrazioni e testimonianze», ha detto un portavoce.

description.en: First on-scene report: position, time window and two small traces near the body.
description.it: Primo verbale sul posto: posizione, finestra temporale e due piccole tracce vicino al corpo.
description.sq: Raporti i parë në vendngjarje: pozicioni, dritarja kohore dhe dy gjurmë të vogla pranë trupit.

content.en:
POLICE — ON-SCENE REPORT
Reference: GF-2306-001

Location: secondary side room, institutional building adjacent to the official route, lower old town.
Deceased: adult male, identified internally as Grand Duke Émeric IV of Luxembourg-Vallée.
Discovered: 23 June, 07:50, by cleaning staff.

Apparent cause: single blunt-force impact to the head; possible secondary fall or repositioning. No weapon found at the scene at time of report.

Estimated time of death: between 00:30 and 00:45, based on body condition and on a fixed wall clock found stopped. The fireworks ran from 00:00 to approximately 00:20, which masked noise and movement in the area.

Trace A: a tiny fragment of black plastic on the victim's cuff, consistent with an access-badge holder.
Trace B: a small quantity of fine golden dust near the body, initially assumed to be fireworks fallout (to be analysed).

Note: a temporary access badge issued to the Armundia retreat appears in the door log for this room. Holder of record: D. Rinaldi. To be verified.
content.it:
POLIZIA — VERBALE SUL POSTO
Riferimento: GF-2306-001

Luogo: sala secondaria, edificio istituzionale adiacente al percorso ufficiale, città bassa.
Deceduto: uomo adulto, identificato internamente come Granduca Émeric IV di Luxembourg-Vallée.
Ritrovamento: 23 giugno, 07:50, dal personale delle pulizie.

Causa apparente: singolo colpo contundente alla testa; possibile caduta o riposizionamento successivo. Nessuna arma trovata sul posto.

Ora stimata della morte: tra le 00:30 e le 00:45, in base alle condizioni del corpo e a un orologio da parete fermo. I fuochi sono andati dalle 00:00 alle 00:20 circa, coprendo rumori e movimenti.

Traccia A: minuscolo frammento di plastica nera sul polsino, compatibile con un porta-badge di accesso.
Traccia B: piccola quantità di polvere dorata vicino al corpo, inizialmente attribuita ai fuochi (da analizzare).

Nota: un badge di accesso temporaneo del retreat Armundia compare nel log della porta di questa sala. Intestatario: D. Rinaldi. Da verificare.

title.sq: Harta e eventeve: qendra e qytetit 21–23 qershor

description.en: A simple map of the key locations and their walking distances.
description.it: Una mappa semplice dei luoghi chiave e delle distanze a piedi.
description.sq: Një hartë e thjeshtë e vendeve kyçe dhe distancave në këmbë.

content.en:
KEY LOCATIONS (walking estimates rounded to 5 minutes)

• Gëlle Fra / Place de la Constitution — crowd watching the fireworks.
• Pont Adolphe — iconic bridge, near the fireworks launch.
• Place de Glacis — site of the 22 June mega concert (until 02:00).
• Armundia House — the group's base.
• LHoFT office — badge-access workplace.

WALKING ESTIMATES
Gëlle Fra → Pont Adolphe: 3–5 min
Gëlle Fra → Place de Glacis: 15–20 min
LHoFT → Gëlle Fra: 15–20 min
LHoFT → Place de Glacis: 25–30 min
Armundia House → Gëlle Fra: 18–25 min
Armundia House → LHoFT: 20–25 min
Armundia House → Place de Glacis: 30–35 min
Pont Adolphe → LHoFT: 15–20 min
content.it:
LUOGHI CHIAVE (stime a piedi arrotondate a 5 minuti)

• Gëlle Fra / Place de la Constitution — folla che guarda i fuochi.
• Pont Adolphe — ponte iconico, vicino al lancio dei fuochi.
• Place de Glacis — maxi concerto del 22 giugno (fino alle 02:00).
• Casa Armundia — base del gruppo.
• Ufficio LHoFT — luogo con accesso badge.

STIME A PIEDI
Gëlle Fra → Pont Adolphe: 3–5 min
Gëlle Fra → Place de Glacis: 15–20 min
LHoFT → Gëlle Fra: 15–20 min
LHoFT → Place de Glacis: 25–30 min
Casa Armundia → Gëlle Fra: 18–25 min
Casa Armundia → LHoFT: 20–25 min
Casa Armundia → Place de Glacis: 30–35 min
Pont Adolphe → LHoFT: 15–20 min

title.sq: Programi zyrtar i festimeve dhe fishekzjarrëve

description.en: The official schedule for 21–23 June, useful to anchor the timeline.
description.it: Il programma ufficiale del 21–23 giugno, utile per ancorare la timeline.
description.sq: Programi zyrtar i 21–23 qershorit, i dobishëm për të ankoruar kronologjinë.

content.en:
NATIONAL DAY PROGRAMME

21 June
  20:00–04:00 — Distributed concerts across districts (techno, rock, hip hop).

22 June
  21:00–02:00 — Mega concert, Place de Glacis.
  00:00–00:20 — Fireworks launched from the lower town, viewed from Place de la Constitution / Gëlle Fra and Pont Adolphe.

23 June
  10:00 — National Day ceremony; a public address by the Grand Duke was scheduled.

Note: the official address of 23 June did not take place.

description.en: A disturbed early-morning emergency call, partly inaudible.
description.it: Una chiamata di emergenza notturna disturbata, in parte inudibile.
description.sq: Një thirrje urgjence e shqetësuar, pjesërisht e padëgjueshme.

content.en:
EMERGENCY LINE — TRANSCRIPT
Received: 23 June, 07:58

OPERATOR: Emergency, what is your location?
CALLER: The side room behind the official route — there is a man, he is not moving — [inaudible] — please hurry.
OPERATOR: Is he breathing?
CALLER: I don't think so. There is — there is something on the floor, a torch, a heavy one — no, it's gone, I — [noise] —
OPERATOR: Stay on the line.
CALLER: I can't, the staff are — [call ends]

Note: caller not identified. Background noise consistent with cleaning equipment.

description.en: Short declared alibis from five members. Several mention the same base address.
description.it: Brevi alibi dichiarati di cinque membri. Diversi citano lo stesso indirizzo base.
description.sq: Alibi të shkurtra të deklaruara nga pesë anëtarë. Disa përmendin të njëjtën adresë bazë.

content.en:
STATEMENTS (summarised)

MARCO BELLANDI (Director): "I watched the fireworks under the Gëlle Fra with part of the group. After midnight I walked back to our base at Rue de l'Aciérie 86."

DAVIDE RINALDI (Backend Dev): "I was at or near the Glacis concert. My phone was dead from 23:50 to 00:40. I lost my temporary badge the day before — I reported it."

ELIRA KODRA (Senior BA): "I passed by Glacis, then went back early. I was near the office area at one point but only briefly."

NORA WEISS (Operations): "I was handling organisational calls for the events and then went back to the house at Rue de l'Aciérie 86. Nothing unusual."

ARBEN LEKA (Frontend Dev): "At 23:55 I was under the Gëlle Fra. Around 00:20 I moved toward Pont Adolphe. By 00:45 I was heading back to the house."
content.it:
DICHIARAZIONI (sintesi)

MARCO BELLANDI (Direttore): «Ho visto i fuochi sotto la Gëlle Fra con parte del gruppo. Dopo mezzanotte sono tornato a piedi alla base in Rue de l'Aciérie 86.»

DAVIDE RINALDI (Backend): «Ero al concerto del Glacis o vicino. Il telefono era scarico dalle 23:50 alle 00:40. Avevo perso il badge temporaneo il giorno prima — l'ho segnalato.»

ELIRA KODRA (BA senior): «Sono passata dal Glacis, poi sono rientrata presto. A un certo punto ero vicino all'ufficio, ma solo per poco.»

NORA WEISS (Operations): «Gestivo chiamate organizzative per gli eventi, poi sono tornata alla casa in Rue de l'Aciérie 86. Nulla di insolito.»

ARBEN LEKA (Frontend): «Alle 23:55 ero sotto la Gëlle Fra. Verso le 00:20 mi sono mosso verso Pont Adolphe. Alle 00:45 stavo rientrando.»

description.en: A focused distances chart to test which alibis are physically possible.
description.it: Una tabella di distanze per verificare quali alibi sono fisicamente possibili.
description.sq: Një tabelë distancash për të testuar cilat alibi janë fizikisht të mundshme.

content.en:
WALKING DISTANCES (rounded to 5 min)

Gëlle Fra → Pont Adolphe: 3–5 min
Gëlle Fra → Place de Glacis: 15–20 min
LHoFT → Gëlle Fra: 15–20 min
LHoFT → Place de Glacis: 25–30 min
Armundia House → Gëlle Fra: 18–25 min
Armundia House → LHoFT: 20–25 min
Armundia House → Place de Glacis: 30–35 min
Pont Adolphe → LHoFT: 15–20 min

USE: If a badge attributed to Davide was used near the LHoFT / side room at ~00:28, ask whether someone genuinely at the Glacis concert (25–30 min away) could have been there in person.

title.it: Screenshot della chat di gruppo Armundia
title.sq: Pamje e bisedës së grupit Armundia

description.en: A screenshot of the team chat from the evening of 22 June.
description.it: Uno screenshot della chat di squadra della sera del 22 giugno.
description.sq: Një pamje e bisedës së ekipit nga mbrëmja e 22 qershorit.

content.en:
ARMUNDIA RETREAT — group chat (22 June)

21:14 Elira: anyone know if the compliance doc was the final version?
21:15 Davide: not the one they'll show. they must NOT see the patch notes before we fix it
21:16 Elira: if it gets out we're finished 😩
21:16 Sofia: relax it's just a bug. talk tomorrow
23:48 Marco: great fireworks spot under the Gëlle Fra, come over
23:49 Sofia: omw
00:51 Nora: back at the house, long day. see you tomorrow
content.it:
ARMUNDIA RETREAT — chat di gruppo (22 giugno)

21:14 Elira: qualcuno sa se il doc di compliance era la versione finale?
21:15 Davide: non quella che mostreranno. NON devono vedere le patch notes prima che le sistemiamo
21:16 Elira: se esce fuori siamo finiti 😩
21:16 Sofia: tranquilla è solo un bug. ne parliamo domani
23:48 Marco: bel punto per i fuochi sotto la Gëlle Fra, venite
23:49 Sofia: arrivo
00:51 Nora: rientrata a casa, giornata lunga. ci vediamo domani

description.en: A first extract of Nora's calls. It looks operational — for now.
description.it: Un primo estratto delle chiamate di Nora. Sembra operativo — per ora.
description.sq: Një ekstrakt i parë i thirrjeve të Norës. Duket operacional — për momentin.

content.en:
CALL LOG — N. Weiss (22–23 June)

21:32 outgoing — "Events Logistics" — 2m 10s
22:47 incoming — "LuxEvent S." — 0m 38s
23:15 outgoing — "Events Logistics" — 1m 05s
00:23 outgoing — "LuxEvent S." — 0m 41s
01:04 outgoing — "Taxi" — 0m 22s

Note: most calls look like routine event coordination.

title.sq: Shënim i brendshëm: hyrjet me distinktiv të përkohshëm

description.en: A short internal note about who managed and issued the temporary badges.
description.it: Una breve nota interna su chi gestiva ed emetteva i badge temporanei.
description.sq: Një shënim i shkurtër i brendshëm për kush i menaxhonte distinktivët e përkohshëm.

content.en:
INTERNAL NOTE

Temporary access badges for the retreat were issued and managed by Operations (N. Weiss), in coordination with the external supplier LuxEvent Secure.

• Badge #0017 was issued to D. Rinaldi for the demo area.
• On 21 June, D. Rinaldi reported badge #0017 as lost.
• The badge was NOT deactivated immediately.

Reminder: badge issuance, spares and deactivation were all handled through Operations.

title.en: Group Photo Under the Gëlle Fra
title.it: Foto di gruppo sotto la Gëlle Fra

description.en: A crowd photo with several group members visible during the fireworks.
description.it: Una foto nella folla con diversi membri del gruppo durante i fuochi.
description.sq: Një foto në turmë me disa anëtarë të grupit gjatë fishekzjarrëve.

content.en:
PHOTO DESCRIPTION

A crowd shot taken under the Gëlle Fra at roughly 00:05–00:10 during the fireworks. Visible in the frame: Marco Bellandi, Sofia Martelli, and — at the edge — Arben Leka. The image timestamp is 00:07.

Not visible: Nora Weiss, Davide Rinaldi. The photo supports several alibis around the Gëlle Fra but says nothing about the side room.

description.en: Door access events for the night, including the side room.
description.it: Eventi di accesso alle porte durante la notte, inclusa la sala secondaria.
description.sq: Ngjarjet e hyrjeve gjatë natës, përfshirë dhomën anësore.

content.en:
ACCESS LOG — doors near Rue du Laboratoire 9 (LHoFT) and the side room

00:11 — LHoFT main door — badge #0044 (N. Weiss) — GRANTED
00:19 — LHoFT service corridor — badge #0044 (N. Weiss) — GRANTED
00:28 — Side room (institutional building) — badge #0017 (D. Rinaldi) — GRANTED
00:42 — Side room — badge #0017 (D. Rinaldi) — GRANTED (exit)
00:49 — LHoFT service corridor — badge #0044 (N. Weiss) — GRANTED

Observations:
• Badge #0017 is the badge Davide reported lost on 21 June.
• Badge #0044 (Operations) moves through the service corridor just before and after the side-room events.
• The side room sits a short walk from the LHoFT (Rue du Laboratoire 9).

title.sq: Fragment i mbajtëses së distinktivit — foto forenzike

description.en: Close-up of the black plastic fragment found on the victim's cuff.
description.it: Primo piano del frammento di plastica nera trovato sul polsino della vittima.
description.sq: Pamje nga afër e fragmentit të plastikës së zezë të gjetur në pranga.

content.en:
FORENSIC NOTE

Trace A (badge-holder fragment) is black ABS plastic with a partial moulding code. The code matches a batch of badge holders supplied by LuxEvent Secure and distributed through Operations for the retreat.

The fragment does not, by itself, identify a person. It identifies the SUPPLY BATCH. The holders from that batch were handled by Operations, not by individual developers.

description.en: Analysis of the golden dust near the body. It is not fireworks fallout.
description.it: Analisi della polvere dorata vicino al corpo. Non è residuo di fuochi.
description.sq: Analizë e pluhurit të artë pranë trupit. Nuk është mbetje fishekzjarri.

content.en:
FORENSIC ANALYSIS

Trace B (golden dust) was initially assumed to be fireworks fallout. It is not.

The particles are a metallic-gold decorative coating used on event ribbon/marking tape. The composition matches material catalogued under LuxEvent Secure event kits, NOT pyrotechnic residue.

Conclusion: the golden dust links the scene to LuxEvent Secure equipment, not to the midnight fireworks. This quietly weakens the "fireworks crowd" framing and points toward the event supply chain.

description.en: The suspicious midnight patch. Read the trigger field carefully.
description.it: La sospetta patch di mezzanotte. Leggete con attenzione il campo trigger.
description.sq: Patch-i i dyshimtë i mesnatës. Lexoni me kujdes fushën e trigger-it.

content.en:
CI/CD DEPLOYMENT LOG

2306 00:17:02  deploy start  pipeline=demo-prod  build=#412
2306 00:17:02  trigger=SCHEDULED (cron 00:17, set 21 June 14:02 by m.serra)
2306 00:17:44  deploy success  artifact=royal-demo-1.4.1
2306 00:17:45  notify: automated

Note: the 00:17 patch was a SCHEDULED automated deployment configured the previous afternoon. No human session is attached to it during the night.

description.en: A clip recovered from Erion's recordings, near the Glacis at the key moment.
description.it: Una clip recuperata dalle registrazioni di Erion, vicino al Glacis nel momento chiave.
description.sq: Një klip i rikuperuar nga regjistrimet e Erionit, pranë Glacis në momentin kyç.

content.en: Audio file may be added later. The transcript below carries the full content.

transcript.en:
RECOVERED AUDIO — TRANSCRIPT
Timestamp on file: 00:31
Location: near Place de Glacis (loud concert in background)

[crowd, music]
Voice 1 (recognised as Davide, in Italian): "...no, my phone's dead, use yours to film..."
Voice 2 (Erion): "ok ok, turn around, the stage —"
[a separate voice in the crowd, in Albanian]: "po vijmë, prit te ura" ("we're coming, wait at the bridge")

Analyst note: an earlier theory held that an Albanian-language phrase on another clip was Arben near Pont Adolphe. This clip shows such phrases are common in the crowd. Crucially, Davide is audible at the Glacis at 00:31 — when badge #0017 was inside the side room. He could not be in both places.
transcript.it:
AUDIO RECUPERATO — TRASCRIZIONE
Timestamp sul file: 00:31
Luogo: vicino a Place de Glacis (concerto rumoroso sullo sfondo)

[folla, musica]
Voce 1 (riconosciuta come Davide, in italiano): «...no, il telefono è scarico, usa il tuo per filmare...»
Voce 2 (Erion): «ok ok, girati, il palco —»
[un'altra voce nella folla, in albanese]: «po vijmë, prit te ura» («arriviamo, aspetta al ponte»)

Nota analista: una teoria precedente sosteneva che una frase in albanese su un'altra clip fosse Arben vicino al Pont Adolphe. Questa clip mostra che tali frasi sono comuni nella folla. Soprattutto: Davide è udibile al Glacis alle 00:31 — quando il badge #0017 era nella sala. Non poteva essere in entrambi i posti.

title.en: Photo Metadata Review — Davide at the Glacis
title.it: Perizia metadati foto — Davide al Glacis
title.sq: Rishikim i metadatave të fotos — Davide te Glacis

description.en: The disputed photo metadata that seemed to make Davide's alibi unreliable.
description.it: I contestati metadati della foto che sembravano rendere inaffidabile l'alibi di Davide.
description.sq: Metadatat e diskutueshme të fotos që dukej se e bënin alibinë e Davides të pabesueshme.

content.en:
METADATA REVIEW

A photo placing Davide at the Glacis carried an ambiguous timestamp (device clock not synced), which fed suspicion that his alibi was faked.

Cross-checked against the recovered audio (00:31, Davide audible at the Glacis) and the concert network time, the photo is consistent with Davide being at the Glacis during the death window. The earlier 'ambiguous metadata' doubt does not survive cross-checking.

title.sq: LuxEvent Secure — ekstrakt i kontratës së furnitorit

description.en: Extract of the supplier contract and who signed off the renewals.
description.it: Estratto del contratto fornitore e di chi ha approvato i rinnovi.
description.sq: Ekstrakt i kontratës së furnitorit dhe kush i miratoi rinovimet.

content.en:
SUPPLIER CONTRACT — EXTRACT

Supplier: LuxEvent Secure (badge holders, access kits, event logistics).
Internal sponsor / sign-off: Operations (N. Weiss).

Notes attached:
• Three consecutive renewals approved without competitive review.
• Two scope extensions added outside the normal procurement process.
• Internal flag raised by compliance: "recurring single-supplier preference; review recommended."

The favouring of LuxEvent Secure runs through Operations.

title.sq: Email konfidencial: kërkohet rishikim i furnitorit

description.en: A confidential message showing the Grand Duke was about to order a supplier review.
description.it: Un messaggio riservato che mostra che il Granduca stava per ordinare una revisione del fornitore.
description.sq: Një mesazh konfidencial që tregon se Duka ishte gati të urdhëronte një rishikim furnitori.

content.en:
CONFIDENTIAL EMAIL — EXTRACT
From: Office of Grand Duke Émeric IV
Date: 22 June, 18:40

"Following the internal flag, I want a full review of the LuxEvent Secure arrangement opened immediately after the weekend. The pattern of renewals and the personal closeness of certain coordinators to this supplier must be examined. Please prepare the paperwork; I will raise it on the 24th."

MOTIVE: this review threatened to expose a system of favours funnelled through Operations toward LuxEvent Secure. The review was due to start the day after the murder.

title.it: Nora ↔ LuxEvent — la chiamata di 41 secondi

description.en: Detailed record of the 00:23 call, inside the death window.
description.it: Dettaglio della chiamata delle 00:23, dentro la finestra della morte.
description.sq: Regjistër i detajuar i thirrjes së 00:23, brenda dritares së vdekjes.

content.en:
CALL DETAIL RECORD

Party A: N. Weiss
Party B: LuxEvent Secure (operations contact)
Start: 23 June 00:23:11
Duration: 41 seconds
Cell sector: lower town, consistent with the LHoFT / side-room area — NOT the Glacis.

Cross-reference:
• 00:28 — badge #0017 (Davide, reported lost) opens the side room.
• 00:23 — this 41-second call places Nora in the lower town, beside the route, minutes before.

This is the call the police flagged. Combined with the badge fragment, the golden dust and the access log, it ties Nora to the scene and to the supplier.

description.en: A clarified statement that places Nora near a technical van, not Arben at the scene.
description.it: Una dichiarazione chiarita che colloca Nora vicino a un furgone tecnico, non Arben sulla scena.
description.sq: Një deklaratë e qartësuar që vendos Norën pranë një furgoni teknik.

content.en:
SECOND STATEMENT

Arben Leka: "On 21 June I saw Nora talking with a man by a LuxEvent technical van — I didn't think it mattered. On the fireworks night, around 00:20 near Pont Adolphe, I saw a figure in an event jacket moving fast toward the lower buildings. I assumed staff. The Albanian phrase others heard on a recording was not me — it came from the crowd."

Giulia Ferri (added): "Davide was at the Glacis with us; I was just too nervous to say it clearly the first time."

description.en: The investigators' best reconstruction once the traces are read together.
description.it: La migliore ricostruzione degli investigatori una volta lette insieme le tracce.
description.sq: Rindërtimi më i mirë i hetuesve kur gjurmët lexohen së bashku.

content.en:
RECONSTRUCTED TIMELINE

00:00–00:20  Fireworks. Crowd at the Gëlle Fra (Marco, Sofia, Arben visible). Davide at/near the Glacis (audio at 00:31).
00:11 / 00:19  Badge #0044 (Nora) moves through the LHoFT service corridor.
00:23  Nora calls LuxEvent Secure (41s), lower town sector.
00:28  Badge #0017 (Davide's lost badge) opens the side room.
00:31  Grand Duke enters the side room (false 'operational check' message).
00:33–00:39  The killing.
00:42  Badge #0017 exits the side room.
00:45  Nora heads back toward Rue de l'Aciérie 86.

Reading: only one person's movements thread the LHoFT corridor, the supplier call and the side-room window — while the loud suspect (Davide) is provably elsewhere. Name that person.

title.sq: Memo: trajtimi i distinktivëve të përkohshëm

description.en: Who could retrieve, hold and fail to deactivate a 'lost' badge.
description.it: Chi poteva recuperare, trattenere e non disattivare un badge «perso».
description.sq: Kush mund të merrte dhe mos ta çaktivizonte një distinktiv «të humbur».

content.en:
MEMO

Temporary badges are physically collected at the Operations desk. When a badge is reported lost, Operations is responsible for immediate deactivation and for storing any recovered badge.

Badge #0017 (Davide) was reported lost on 21 June but was NOT deactivated. It remained usable until at least 00:42 on 23 June.

Only Operations (N. Weiss) had routine custody of recovered and spare badges. A developer could not deactivate or hold these badges; Operations could.

title.sq: Raport: elektrik dore teknik që mungon

description.en: Inventory note about a heavy event flashlight that vanished that night.
description.it: Nota di inventario su una pesante torcia da evento sparita quella notte.
description.sq: Shënim inventari për një elektrik dore të rëndë eventi që u zhduk atë natë.

content.en:
INVENTORY / SCENE NOTE

The injury is consistent with a heavy metal technical flashlight of the type used by event staff.

LuxEvent Secure event-kit inventory shows one heavy technical flashlight signed out for the National Day events and never returned. The likely weapon was removed from the scene, plausibly inside a LuxEvent equipment container collected through the supplier's logistics circuit.

No weapon was found at the scene — consistent with removal by someone with access to the supplier's containers.

description.en: The document that explains what was actually fixed — and clears the technical suspicion.
description.it: Il documento che spiega cosa è stato davvero corretto — e scagiona il sospetto tecnico.
description.sq: Dokumenti që shpjegon çfarë u rregullua vërtet — dhe largon dyshimin teknik.

content.en:
PATCH NOTES — royal-demo 1.4.1

Fix: removed an undocumented 'royal-preview' mode that could display unauthorised sample data.
Fix: corrected an access-log rounding bug that mislabelled event times.
Reason for secrecy: the team did not want the demo's hidden preview shown to the Grand Duke before it was fixed — hence "they must not see the patch notes."

This is the whole meaning of Davide's alarming message: a software embarrassment, not a murder plan. The phrase that framed him is, in fact, his exoneration.

profile.en: Charismatic, client-focused, very protective of the company's reputation and under pressure to close an institutional partnership.
profile.it: Carismatico, orientato al cliente, molto attento alla reputazione aziendale e sotto pressione per chiudere una partnership istituzionale.
profile.sq: Karizmatik, i fokusuar te klienti, shumë mbrojtës i reputacionit të kompanisë.

motive.en: Could want to avoid a scandal or a failed demo damaging the company.
motive.it: Potrebbe voler evitare uno scandalo o una demo fallita che danneggi l'azienda.

declaredAlibi.en: Watched the fireworks under the Gëlle Fra with the group, then walked back to the house.
declaredAlibi.it: Ha visto i fuochi sotto la Gëlle Fra col gruppo, poi è tornato alla casa.

contraEvidence.en: Knew confidential logistics details and asked the team not to talk to the press.
Deleted a draft email after the death.

proEvidence.en: Clearly visible in the group photo during the fireworks.
No technical ability to alter access logs.

profile.en: Precise, excellent at gathering requirements, a natural bridge between Italian and Albanian colleagues.
profile.it: Precisa, ottima nella raccolta requisiti, ponte naturale tra colleghi italiani e albanesi.

motive.en: Feared being blamed for a documentation error in the compliance pack.
motive.it: Temeva di essere accusata per un errore documentale nel pacchetto compliance.

declaredAlibi.en: Passed by the Glacis, then returned early; briefly near the office.
declaredAlibi.it: Passata dal Glacis, poi rientrata presto; brevemente vicino all'ufficio.

contraEvidence.en: Wrote 'if it gets out we're finished' in the group chat.
Had access to a restricted folder; badge seen near the LHoFT at an ambiguous time.

proEvidence.en: The chat line was about a software bug, not the Grand Duke.
Her badge movements have an innocent operational explanation.

profile.en: Highly skilled, introverted, knows APIs, logs, audit trails and access systems. Blunt with colleagues.
profile.it: Molto competente, introverso, conosce API, log, audit trail e sistemi di accesso. Brusco con i colleghi.

motive.en: Apparently: to cover a technical manipulation. In reality, none for the murder.
motive.it: Apparentemente: coprire una manipolazione tecnica. In realtà nessuno per il delitto.

declaredAlibi.en: At/near the Glacis concert; phone dead 23:50–00:40; lost his temporary badge.
declaredAlibi.it: Al Glacis o vicino; telefono scarico 23:50–00:40; aveva perso il badge temporaneo.

contraEvidence.en: His badge #0017 opened the side room at 00:28.
Dead phone, knowledge of logs, and the alarming 'patch notes' message.

proEvidence.en: He reported the badge lost on 21 June; it was never deactivated.
Recovered audio places him at the Glacis at 00:31 — he cannot be in two places.

profile.en: Brilliant and creative, great at demo interfaces, often underestimated by senior colleagues.
profile.it: Brillante e creativo, bravissimo con le interfacce demo, spesso sottovalutato.

motive.en: Avoid the Grand Duke discovering an undocumented demo mode he had hidden.
motive.it: Evitare che il Granduca scoprisse una modalità demo non documentata da lui nascosta.

declaredAlibi.en: Under the Gëlle Fra at 23:55, toward Pont Adolphe at 00:20, heading home by 00:45.
declaredAlibi.it: Sotto la Gëlle Fra alle 23:55, verso Pont Adolphe alle 00:20, rientro alle 00:45.

contraEvidence.en: Knew the route Gëlle Fra–Pont Adolphe–LHoFT; an Albanian voice seemed to match a recording.
Only person who knew the hidden 'royal-preview' button.

proEvidence.en: Seen by many at the fireworks; no physical access to the side room.
The Albanian phrase came from the crowd, not from him.

profile.en: Very sociable, excellent communicator, handles minutes, follow-ups and client materials.
profile.it: Molto socievole, ottima comunicatrice, gestisce minute, follow-up e materiali cliente.

motive.en: Avoid a scandal over a document sent by mistake; protect an external contact.
motive.it: Evitare uno scandalo per un documento inviato per errore; proteggere un contatto esterno.

declaredAlibi.en: Stayed with the group at the Gëlle Fra, then moved toward the Glacis.
declaredAlibi.it: Rimasta col gruppo alla Gëlle Fra, poi verso il Glacis.

contraEvidence.en: Deleted a chat with a contact called 'L.'.
Knew the room the Grand Duke would pass through.

proEvidence.en: No technical ability to alter logs.
'L.' is an external events/personal contact, unrelated to the murder.

profile.en: Practical and fast, fixes problems at the last minute, knows both frontend and backend.
profile.it: Pratico e veloce, risolve problemi all'ultimo, conosce frontend e backend.

motive.en: Apparently: hide a backdoor. In reality, none for the murder.
motive.it: Apparentemente: nascondere una backdoor. In realtà nessuno per il delitto.

declaredAlibi.en: Working on a fix at the house, then out briefly to see the fireworks from afar.
declaredAlibi.it: Al lavoro su una fix in casa, poi fuori brevemente per vedere i fuochi da lontano.

contraEvidence.en: A patch was deployed at 00:17; his laptop showed activity at odd hours.

proEvidence.en: The 00:17 patch was a scheduled automated deploy set the previous afternoon.

profile.en: New to the team, very observant, tends not to speak up.
profile.it: Nuova nel team, molto osservatrice, tende a non esporsi.

declaredAlibi.en: With a small group under the Gëlle Fra; lost the group during the fireworks.
declaredAlibi.it: Con un piccolo gruppo sotto la Gëlle Fra; ha perso il gruppo durante i fuochi.

contraEvidence.en: Initial statement was confused; didn't immediately confirm seeing Davide.

proEvidence.en: More witness than suspect; later confirms Davide was at the Glacis.

profile.en: Methodical, loves logs, screenshots and automated tests; records everything.
profile.it: Metodico, ama log, screenshot e test automatici; registra tutto.

declaredAlibi.en: Recording footage for an internal retreat video, then at the Glacis.
declaredAlibi.it: Stava registrando per un video interno del retreat, poi al Glacis.

contraEvidence.en: His footage is missing the 00:09–00:23 segment; phone was switched off.

proEvidence.en: His recovered audio dismantles a false alibi and helps clear Davide.

profile.en: Organises logistics, badges, rooms and movements; knows suppliers and city events. Easy to overlook.
profile.it: Organizza logistica, badge, sale e spostamenti; conosce fornitori ed eventi cittadini. Facile da sottovalutare.

motive.en: Coordinated the logistics protocol and knew exactly where and when the Grand Duke would pass.
motive.it: Ha coordinato il protocollo logistico e sapeva dove e quando sarebbe passato il Granduca.

declaredAlibi.en: On organisational calls, then back at the group's base after midnight.
declaredAlibi.it: Al telefono per l'organizzazione, poi alla base del gruppo dopo mezzanotte.

contraEvidence.en: Managed and could retrieve temporary badges; knew the side-room access.
Repeatedly called by an external supplier.

proEvidence.en: No technical ability to cover logs.
Her calls look genuinely operational — at first.

profile.en: Ambitious, wants a more senior role, very good at telling the product story.
profile.it: Ambizioso, vuole un ruolo più alto, molto bravo a raccontare il prodotto.

motive.en: A failed professional opportunity; fear the Grand Duke would block the partnership.
motive.it: Un'occasione professionale fallita; paura che il Granduca bloccasse la partnership.

declaredAlibi.en: With Marco during the fireworks, then to the Glacis.
declaredAlibi.it: Con Marco durante i fuochi, poi al Glacis.

contraEvidence.en: Lied about a short movement at 00:12; his name is in a confidential note.

proEvidence.en: The movement was to retrieve his phone; no technical or badge access.

description.en: Armundia colleagues arrive in Luxembourg; the demo is shown informally.
description.it: I colleghi Armundia arrivano in Lussemburgo; la demo è mostrata informalmente.

description.en: Distributed concerts. Davide reports badge #0017 lost; it is not deactivated.
description.it: Concerti diffusi. Davide segnala il badge #0017 perso; non viene disattivato.

description.en: Twenty minutes of fireworks over the Gëlle Fra. Noise and crowd mask movement.
description.it: Venti minuti di fuochi sulla Gëlle Fra. Rumore e folla coprono i movimenti.

title.it: Badge di Nora nel corridoio LHoFT
title.sq: Distinktivi i Norës në korridorin LHoFT

description.en: Badge #0044 (Nora) passes through the LHoFT service corridor.
description.it: Il badge #0044 (Nora) passa nel corridoio di servizio del LHoFT.

description.en: Nora calls LuxEvent Secure for 41 seconds.
description.it: Nora chiama LuxEvent Secure per 41 secondi.

title.en: Side room opened with Davide's badge
title.it: Sala aperta col badge di Davide
title.sq: Dhoma anësore hapet me distinktivin e Davides

description.en: Badge #0017 (Davide's lost badge) opens the side room — while Davide is at the Glacis.
description.it: Il badge #0017 (perso da Davide) apre la sala — mentre Davide è al Glacis.

description.en: The Grand Duke, lured by a false operational message, is struck with a heavy technical flashlight.
description.it: Il Granduca, attirato da un falso messaggio operativo, è colpito con una pesante torcia tecnica.

description.en: Movement back toward the group's base.
description.it: Spostamento verso la base del gruppo.

description.en: Cleaning staff find the body. The investigation begins.
description.it: Il personale delle pulizie trova il corpo. Inizia l'indagine.

label.en: Which red herring had to be discarded?
label.sq: Cila pistë e rreme duhej hedhur poshtë?

solutionTitle.it: Caso risolto — La logistica ha battuto la tecnologia
solutionTitle.sq: Rasti u zgjidh — Logjistika mundi teknologjinë

solutionExplanation.it:
Il colpevole è Nora Weiss — la persona che tutti avevano sottovalutato.

Per tutta l'indagine gli indizi sembravano puntare ai profili tecnici. Il badge di Davide, la patch delle 00:17, il telefono scarico, i log incompleti e la sua conoscenza dei sistemi lo rendevano il sospetto perfetto. Era proprio questo il punto: troppo perfetto.

L'assassino non aveva bisogno di manipolare il sistema dall'interno. Doveva sapere come muoversi tra eventi, badge, fornitori e accessi secondari. Nora era l'unica con conoscenza logistica completa e un legame diretto con LuxEvent Secure.

Il Granduca Émeric IV stava per chiedere una revisione del contratto del fornitore dopo una segnalazione interna. Nora, parte del sistema di favori che aveva favorito LuxEvent Secure, rischiava di essere esposta.

Durante i fuochi di mezzanotte la città era perfetta per sparire. Nora ha usato il badge temporaneo smarrito di Davide (#0017), ha attirato il Granduca in una sala con un falso messaggio operativo e lo ha colpito con una pesante torcia tecnica, poi ha fatto sparire l'arma attraverso il circuito logistico del fornitore.

Le prove decisive erano il mosaico: il badge di Davide usato a un orario incompatibile (è nell'audio di Erion al Glacis alle 00:31); il frammento di porta-badge di un lotto LuxEvent gestito da Operations; la polvere dorata legata al materiale LuxEvent, non ai fuochi; la chiamata di 41 secondi a LuxEvent alle 00:23; l'accesso alla sala dal corridoio LHoFT usato dal suo badge; il movente legato alla revisione del contratto.

Davide era stato incastrato. Solo per Nora tutti gli elementi convergono.

wrongAnswerExplanation.en:
Your accusation is understandable, but it does not hold all the way.

The most visible clue was also the most dangerous: Davide's badge. It looked like objective technical proof, but a badge proves the use of an object, not the identity of the person using it. The 00:17 patch, the dead phone and the incomplete logs built a strong suspicion, but they explained neither the real motive nor the link to the external supplier.

The solution required connecting logistics, walking times, secondary accesses and an economic/reputational motive. The only person at the centre of all of these is Nora Weiss.
wrongAnswerExplanation.it:
La vostra accusa è comprensibile, ma non regge fino in fondo.

La prova più evidente era anche la più pericolosa: il badge di Davide. Sembrava una prova tecnica oggettiva, ma un badge prova l'uso di un oggetto, non l'identità di chi lo usa. La patch delle 00:17, il telefono scarico e i log incompleti creavano un sospetto forte, ma non spiegavano il movente reale né il legame col fornitore esterno.

La soluzione richiedeva di collegare logistica, tempi di percorrenza, accessi secondari e movente economico/reputazionale. L'unica persona al centro di tutto è Nora Weiss.
